zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev John Barker於1462年出生在英國史洛普爾可拉維利時，他的父親John Le Barker26歲，母親Elizabeth Greene26歲。他於1488年與Margaret Coleclough在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1531年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾蕾托 德雷頓享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾可拉維利。

nameMeanings.name: Barker
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a tanner of leather, from Middle English barkere ‘tanner’, tree bark having been used as the tanning agent.

English: occupational name for a shepherd, from Middle English berker, bercher (Old French berchier, bercher, berkier, berker, Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’, genitive berbicis). With the change of -ar- to -er- in Middle English, this became indistinguishable from the preceding name (see 1 above).
Americanized form of German   Berger   or   Barger  .

variants.name: Berger
meanings: German, Dutch, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived in the mountains or hills (see   Berg  ). The surname of German origin is also found in many other European countries, e.g. in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Russia, Poland, Czechia, Hungary, and Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic topographic names or surnames. As a Jewish name it is mainly artificial. Compare   Bargar  ,   Barger  ,   Barker  ,   Barrier  , and   Barriger  .
French: occupational name from Old French bergier ‘shepherd’ (from Late Latin berbicarius, from berbex ‘ram’). It is also found in England, as a surname of Huguenot origin. Compare Shepard .
Norwegian: habitational name from any of various farms so named with the plural of   Berg   ‘mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev John Barker was born in 1462, in Claverley, Shropshire, England, his father, John Le Barker, was 26 and his mother, Elizabeth Greene, was 26. He married Margaret Coleclough in 1488, in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1531, in Little Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Claverley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev John Barker est né en 1462, à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John Le Barker, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Greene, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Coleclough en 1488, à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1531, à Little Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Claverley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev John Barker è nato il nel 1462 nel Claverley, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John Le Barker, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Greene, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Coleclough nel 1488, nel Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Rev John Barkerが1462年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーで生まれた時，父John Le Barkerは26歳，母Elizabeth Greeneは26歳であった。1488年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンでMargaret Colecloughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1531年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアリットル ドレイトンで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアクラバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev John Barker(이)가 1462년 영국 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Le Barker(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Greene(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에서 Margaret Coleclough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1531년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 리틀 드라이턴에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 클레이벌리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rev John Barker nasceu em 1462, em Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Le Barker, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Greene, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Coleclough em 1488, em Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1531, em Little Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev John Barker родился в 1462 г. в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Le Barker было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Greene, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Coleclough в 1488 г. в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1531 г. в местности литл дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности клавирли, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev John Barker nació en 1462, en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Le Barker, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Greene, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Coleclough en 1488, en Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1531, en Little Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Claverley, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
